China arrested US citizen Min Zin, head of a Myanmar-focused think tank and a PhD candidate at UC Berkeley, at Kunming airport on 3 June on suspicion of espionage and endangering Chinese national security, according to Chinese government and diplomatic sources.

The UK economy contracted by 0.1% in April as the Iran war began to weigh on growth, following a 0.3% rise in March, with a 0.2% decline in services output the main driver, according to the Office for National Statistics.
